## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's performance and discuss contract alignment for Datagrid.ai (Toric).](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Contract misalignment: Only 2 out of 4 work streams are actively executed](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Strong performance in programmatic SEO and founder-led social media content](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Need for contract revision before renewal to better reflect actual work and value](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [Opportunity for content repurposing and diversification of deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)

## Topics

### Contract Performance and Execution

  - [Signed in November 2024, four main tracks initially planned](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [Currently executing only 2 out of 4 work streams effectively](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
      - [Programmatic SEO: Performing well, creating awareness and improving top-of-funnel metrics](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [Founder-led social media content: Starting to show results](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [Outbound campaigns: Paused due to noise generation and lack of qualified leads](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Strategic partnerships: Limited execution (e.g., no webinar cross-promotion)](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)

### Jobs-to-be-Done (JTBD) Initiative

  - [Project paused due to timing and potential risk to sales motion](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Datagrid.ai not ready for customer interviews at this stage](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Alternative approach suggested: Utilize existing call recordings and AI analysis](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [Thiago's AI-driven approach: Using call transcripts to generate business cases](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)

### Content Strategy and Repurposing

  - [Strong performance in programmatic content generation](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Need for more content repurposing and diversification](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Suggestions: Create visual maps of use cases, PDFs, sales collateral from existing content](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage AI for content analysis and repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)

### Team Feedback and Collaboration

  - [Positive feedback on team members: Jason, Vivek, Mara, and George](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Thiago appreciates the team's efforts and is open to being a "guinea pig" for new initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)

### Marketing Strategy and Future Plans

  - [GrowthX currently the only marketing resource for Datagrid.ai](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Significant marketing investment planned for second half of next year](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Need to clarify GrowthX's role in future marketing strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Redefine scope of work to align with current execution and future direction](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Explore content repurposing and diversification opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

  - [Prepare for contract renewal discussion, focusing on value delivery and track record](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Investigate ways to expand GrowthX's role in Datagrid.ai's future marketing strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xcE--JQRJ3WZGNXrjiCo2VPsCufvJxXC?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
